name: Shastena
title: Hive Tender
abilityText: Exhaust this card to choose 1 player. That player may produce 2 ground forces on any planet that contains 1 of their space docks.

name: Solikhera
title: Nest Architect
abilityText: Place Arachnera dock token in your reinforcements. This is an additional space dock unit. Your space dock component limit is increased by 1.
unlockCondition: Have 6 captured units on your faction sheet.

name: Arachnera
title: Eternal Queen Mother
abilityText: For each system that contains 1 or more of your infantry, you may destroy any number of those infantry to capture 1 unit you do not control that has a cost value equal to or less than the number of infantry you destroy and is in or adjacent ot that system.

name: The Adjudicator
title: Descriptor
abilityText: Exhaust this Card to choose 1 player who is your neighbor, that player must give 1 promissory note that is from their hand or face up in their play area, that player then gains 2 trade goods.

name: Jury of the Council
title: Descriptor
abilityText: You are considered neighbors with all players. When you gain a Promissory Note from another player for the first time this round, you gain 1 trade good.
unlockCondition: Have 1 or more promissory notes, that are from 2 or more players, in your hand or faceup in your play area.

name: The Executioner
title: Descriptor
abilityWindow: After you resolve the effect of a promissory note or action card:
abilityText: Return the promissory note or component action card you used to your hand instead of returning it to its assigned player or discard pile, then purge this card.
